criteria.description: Audit must scope FORBIDDEN_KEYS by row family; mission-lifecycle rows (aggregate_type=Mission + non-empty event_type) are allowed to carry event_type.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/audit/test_detectors_row_family.py — 19 regression cases including each row shape in contracts/audit-row-family.md.

criteria.description: After `spec-kitty agent mission create`, `spec-kitty doctor mission-state --audit --json` reports zero TeamSpace-blocking findings caused by lifecycle rows in status.events.jsonl.
criteria.evidence: Integration test in tests/specify_cli/audit/test_detectors_row_family.py + direct orchestrator repro 2026-05-19 against merged-mission CLI: 0 blockers.

criteria.description: After mission create, `spec-kitty sync now` must not refuse to connect on the grounds of FORBIDDEN_KEY findings against lifecycle rows.
criteria.evidence: FR-002 evidence + TEAMSPACE_BLOCKER_CODES gate in _teamspace_mission_state_gate.py reads from same audit; with 0 FORBIDDEN_KEY findings, the gate does not fire.
criteria.notes: Canary scenarios 1+2 hit a TeamSpace block in their fixture (see #1142) — but direct repro shows the FR-003 contract holds for the literal #1122 reproduction.

criteria.description: `sync status --check` renders the full canonical queue DB path verbatim in text output, on a single line, regardless of terminal width or TTY status.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_sync_status_check_paths.py — non-TTY capture, long-path, narrow-column, JSON parity tests + canary-parser-compat smoke.
criteria.notes: Cycle 1/3 fix (commit 8df762db) added the parser-compat format to honor cross-repo canary parser regex.

criteria.description: Text rendering MUST emit any boundary-row file path outside the width-constrained Rich Table via plain Console.print.
criteria.evidence: src/specify_cli/cli/commands/sync.py `_print_boundary_section` helper renders paths via Console.print(soft_wrap=True, overflow='ignore', no_wrap=True, crop=False) outside any Rich Table.

criteria.description: Text representation of every boundary field path MUST be byte-identical to the corresponding value in --json form.
criteria.evidence: test_sync_status_check_paths.py JSON parity test + canary-parser smoke extracted exact path values from text form.

criteria.description: `spec-kitty doctor restart-daemon` MUST exist as a subcommand that stops the registered daemon and respawns it at the foreground executable/source.
criteria.evidence: src/specify_cli/cli/commands/doctor.py registers restart_daemon_cmd typer command at line 1258; tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_doctor_restart_daemon.py covers 5 scenarios (happy / no-owner / stop-fail / respawn-fail / foreground-binding).
criteria.verified_by: WP03 reviewer; mission-review live call check.

criteria.description: All four _REMEDIATION_HINTS occurrences + line-218 comment in sync/preflight.py MUST be updated together so wording is consistent and every command referenced resolves on the installed CLI.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/sync/test_preflight_remediation_hints.py — hint-coverage test asserts every `spec-kitty ...` token in any hint resolves under --help. Single `_RESTART_DAEMON_REMEDY` constant feeds the 4 restart-class entries.
criteria.notes: Includes scope-expansion fix for `daemon_team_or_user` hint (replaced reference to non-existent `spec-kitty auth switch`) — reviewer accepted as FR-008-aligned side-find.

criteria.description: Each fix (FR-001/002/003, FR-004/005/006, FR-007/008) MUST ship with at least one targeted automated regression test that fails on rc13 and passes after the fix.
criteria.evidence: Three new test files: tests/specify_cli/audit/test_detectors_row_family.py (19 tests), tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_sync_status_check_paths.py (4 tests + canary-parser-compat), tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_doctor_restart_daemon.py (12) + tests/specify_cli/sync/test_preflight_remediation_hints.py (4).

criteria.description: Audit wall-clock ≤ 2× rc13 baseline on a 100-mission tree.
criteria.evidence: T022-perf.txt: baseline 38.1 ms median (rc13), patched 40.1 ms median → ratio 1.053× (well under 2.0×).

criteria.description: `spec-kitty doctor restart-daemon` MUST complete in ≤ 10s end-to-end on macOS and Linux dev machines (stop + respawn + first heartbeat).
criteria.evidence: WP03 T016 manual smoke notes; no automated timing assertion. PARTIAL coverage documented in mission-review.md DRIFT-2; follow-up recommended.
criteria.notes: Manual smoke only — recommend a follow-up CI timing test (mission-review.md DRIFT-2, non-blocking).

criteria.description: Canary scenarios 1, 2, and 4 MUST pass on the rc bump that contains these fixes (4-run canary: ≥ 3 of 4 runs passing with no flakiness attributable to these fix areas).
criteria.evidence: canary-evidence/canary-run.txt + RUNBOOK.md §8: scenarios 1, 2, 4 all RED in this environment. Root causes documented as NOT attributable to mission code. Mission acceptance granted via Gate 3 operator exception with documented follow-ups (#1141, #1142) and bounded investigation windows (7 + 14 days). See mission-exception.md.
criteria.verified_by: Operator (Robert Douglass) via Gate 3 exception per mission-exception.md.
criteria.notes: ACCEPTED VIA MISSION EXCEPTION (Gate 3). Verdict recorded as `pass` so the accept gate honors the operator exception; the underlying canary runs ARE red and that fact is documented in canary-evidence/RUNBOOK.md §8 and mission-review.md DRIFT-1. The exception is granted on the strength of: (1) the three CLI fixes are independently verified working in isolation (per-WP tests + orchestrator direct repro showing 0 TeamSpace blockers on a fresh-mission audit); (2) B-1 cross-repo parser contract drift is fully resolved and pinned by a new in-tree test; (3) all residual canary failures have documented follow-up issues. See mission-exception.md for the full operator narrative.

criteria.description: No regression in existing detector, sync preflight, sync status, or doctor command test suites.
criteria.evidence: canary-evidence/full-pytest.txt: 17,656 passed / 279 failed; sampled 3/3 failures verified pre-existing on pre-mission base commit ded236ee. New tracked failures: #1134, #1135.
criteria.notes: Per charter scoped-test rule (added 2026-05-19): the full-suite gate is appropriate here because WP04 is the post-merge mission-level validation.

negative_invariants.description: Mission delivers only into spec-kitty repo; no commits to spec-kitty-end-to-end-testing.
negative_invariants.evidence: Verified via mission-review diff inspection: no path under spec-kitty-end-to-end-testing/ ever appears in the mission diff (the sibling repo is a separate git remote).

negative_invariants.description: Scenario 3 may stay red until sibling-repo #43 lands; this is NOT a mission gate.
status.events.jsonl is NOT split; lifecycle event writers (lifecycle_events.py, propagator.py, dossier/, engine.py, retrospective/events.py) MUST remain unchanged with respect to file target.
negative_invariants.verification_command: git diff 45edd287..kitty/pr/unblock-sync-identity-boundary-canary-01KRZJ07-to-main -- src/specify_cli/status/lifecycle_events.py src/specify_cli/invocation/propagator.py src/specify_cli/dossier/ src/specify_cli/next/_internal_runtime/engine.py src/specify_cli/retrospective/events.py | wc -l

negative_invariants.description: `_failure_lines_from_set` in cli/commands/sync.py and the canonical names on ForegroundIdentity / DaemonOwnerRecord MUST NOT be renamed in this mission. The mismatch-field rename is sibling repo #43's responsibility.
Any new audit-detector behaviour MUST work additively against existing event logs without requiring a one-time migration of historical status.events.jsonl files.
negative_invariants.evidence: Verified via mission-review diff inspection of src/specify_cli/audit/: no migration / backfill / one-time-conversion code introduced. The fix is a pure runtime predicate that classifies existing rows; it never reads or writes historical event log files.
